center.name: 卡坦端内斯省
center.summary: 卡坦端内斯省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Philippine eagle-owl、菲律賓三趾翠鳥、Bicol ground warbler等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to southern Luzon and Catanduanes in the Philippines

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Contrary to its name, it is also found outside the Calabarzon region where it also inhabits Central Luzon, Bicol Peninsula and Catanduanes

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to the Philippines, where it is found in lowland forests on the islands of Catanduanes, Samar, Bohol, Mindanao, Luzon, Leyte and possibly Sibuyan.Philippine Eagle-Owl
